name: Fresh Berry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Pint Berries (strawberries, raspberries, blackberries, boysenberries, or a combination)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and drain the berries thoroughly.
2. Place the berries in a food processor or blender and process until smooth.
3. Add lemon juice and sugar, then process until well combined, pulsing on and off while tasting for sweetness.
4. Serve the sauce over fresh berries, low-fat cake, sorbet, or frozen yogurt.
Yield: 1 cup
Accompaniments:
Mixed fresh berries and low-fat pound cake
Garnish: Mint sprigs
